div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 944px; height: 1px; padding-top: 24px; margin-left: 269px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 162px; overflow: hidden; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

ol.li: WhatsApp user sends a message via Meta Cloud API.
Meta forwards the webhook to Amazon API Gateway.
Receiver Lambda: validates, reads credentials from Secrets Manager, downloads media to S3, saves to DynamoDB.
DynamoDB Stream with tumbling window (3s) buffers messages from the same user.
Processor Lambda: aggregates buffered messages, transcribes audio, invokes AgentCore once per user.
AgentCore Runtime processes with memory context and returns response via Meta Graph API.
